title: Netherite to Amethyst (Nethertyst)
description: Resource Pack that Changes Netherite Tools.
body:
![Logo (that's one big title..)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a5404d048334e3f9cda3c87b6dea77f7feb0c2c.png)

💎 A simple visual overhaul that replaces all Netherite items with Amethyst variants.
![Every texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75bdab2d07e79a81918e62cc81eca4860a384142_0.webp)
## Features

- Amethyst-themed textures for Netherite ingots

- Amethyst versions of Netherite tools and equipment

- Fully visual—no gameplay changes
![Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4780864d98626720c2ec9953f5b2a40d5e46538e_0.webp) 
⚙️ This is my first resource pack on Modrinth. Feedback is appreciated! 📨
